summary: Frozen HEAD 6ed774dc independently satisfies the runtime contract: gate_evidence and release_risk now default to content_surface, unchanged recorded surfaces survive unrelated main movement and rebase or merge, changed or unresolved surfaces fail closed, and reasoned strict_head plus legacy, dirty-fingerprint, inspection, provenance, and lifecycle behavior remain compatible.
inspection_summary: Inspected the full origin/main...6ed774dc change surface, the #381-derived merge-delta path, content-binding evaluation order, Story/Architecture/Spec lineage, generated review plan and current-HEAD verification evidence; independently reran the focused freshness and inspection-first suites with 39/39 passing.
inspection_evidence: node --test test/content-scoped-evidence-freshness.test.js test/review-inspection-first.test.js => 39 passed, 0 failed at HEAD 6ed774dc77d187c42b894e2f073a50580c72e631; .vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-surface-aware-agent-review-freshness/verification-evidence.json records current-HEAD E2E 8/8 and focused 39/39.
judgment_delta: Initial concern that removing built-in strict_head could bypass conservative invalidation -> resolved because build/evaluateContentBinding rejects missing, unbound, unreadable, or hash-mismatched surfaces before reuse, and bindReviewResult separately preserves dirty-fingerprint checks.

Initial concern that gate_evidence and release_risk would still stale before reaching #381 merge-delta reuse -> resolved because getRolePolicy no longer injects built-in strict roles, generated policy reports content_surface, current content bindings survive HEAD movement, and legacy records still reach evaluateMergeDeltaReviewReuse.

Initial concern that release-impact or generated lineage changes could silently reuse another role's review -> resolved by role-specific inspection inputs and tests proving only the role bound to the changed projection-lineage or release-impact file becomes stale.

Initial concern that compatibility guarantees might regress -> resolved by current-HEAD tests for reasoned CLI and role strict_head, unresolved merge-delta fail-closed behavior, inspection requirements, agent provenance, authorization, closure, and lifecycle replacement semantics.

Initial concern that the post-354e lineage repair changed runtime behavior -> resolved because the final delta only adds explicit parent_design metadata and Story-local budget rationale; source and contract tests remain unchanged and current-HEAD evidence was regenerated.
